$description: Component tokens for Mobile Progress Pill Determinate — a pill-shaped circular progress ring with a percentage label centered inside. The ring (track + indicator arc) is rendered as SVG image assets. Supports 3 sizes: sm (24px ring), md (32px ring), lg (40px ring). The label typography scales with ring size. Figma Reference: Node ID 390-51

$component.name: Progress Pill Determinate
$component.description: A pill-shaped (capsule/oval) progress indicator that shows a determinate percentage via a filled arc around the pill ring perimeter. The pill ring and its filled arc are rendered as SVG image assets (Base + Progress layers). The percentage text is centered inside the pill. Three sizes scale both the ring dimensions and the label typography. Used for compact progress displays where a round or pill form factor fits better than a linear bar.
$component.structure: Outer bounding container (varies by size). Base SVG image (the pill ring track). Progress SVG image overlay (the filled arc — shifted right of center because the arc starts from the right side of the pill). Centered percentage text label (absolute, vertically centered).

sizes.sm: Ring 24px tall — compact variant for tight layouts
sizes.lg: Ring 40px tall — prominent variant for featured metrics

variants.size: sm | md | lg — scales ring height, ring width, and label typography

usage.contexts: Compact progress displays, status badges, task completion chips, achievement indicators. Figma tags: progress, spinner, label inside, pill.
usage.features: 3 sizes, pill/capsule ring shape, centered percentage label, SVG-rendered ring track and indicator arc

ring.$comment: The pill-shaped ring dimensions (the actual SVG rendering area, excluding bounding box padding). Track and indicator are SVG image assets.

sm.description: Mobile progress pill ring height for sm size - 24px (the rendered ring SVG height)

md.description: Mobile progress pill ring height for md size - 32px

lg.description: Mobile progress pill ring height for lg size - 40px

color.description: Mobile progress pill ring track color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (the unfilled/remaining portion of the pill ring)
Mobile progress pill ring indicator arc color - primary/blue/600 - #155eef (the filled progress arc)

label.$comment: Percentage text centered inside the pill ring. Typography and container dimensions scale with ring size.

sm.description: Mobile progress pill label typography for sm size - 14px Medium, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/lg)

md.description: Mobile progress pill label typography for md size - 16px Medium, 24px line-height (font/size/2xl, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/2xl)

lg.description: Mobile progress pill label typography for lg size - 18px Medium, 28px line-height (font/size/3xl, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/3xl)

color.description: Mobile progress pill label text color - gray/700 - #344054 (consistent across all sizes)

alignment.description: Mobile progress pill label text alignment - center (horizontally and vertically centered within the pill)
